'''worajaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:yolkless|yolkless]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| w-r-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yolkless|yolkless]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| worajaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:worajithi|worajithi]] || [[word:worajiji|worajiji]] || [[word:worajishi|worajishi]] || [[word:worajiki|worajiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:worajuthuthu|worajuthuthu]] || [[word:worajujuju|worajujuju]] || [[word:worajushushu|worajushushu]] || [[word:worajukuku|worajukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:worajuthu|worajuthu]] || [[word:worajuju|worajuju]] || [[word:worajushu|worajushu]] || [[word:worajuku|worajuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:worajufthuf|worajufthuf]] || [[word:worajufjuf|worajufjuf]] || [[word:worajufshuf|worajufshuf]] || [[word:worajufkuf|worajufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:worajethe|worajethe]] || [[word:worajeje|worajeje]] || [[word:worajeshe|worajeshe]] || [[word:worajeke|worajeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:worajothotho|worajothotho]] || [[word:worajojojo|worajojojo]] || [[word:worajoshosho|worajoshosho]] || [[word:worajokoko|worajokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:worajotho|worajotho]] || [[word:worajojo|worajojo]] || [[word:worajosho|worajosho]] || [[word:worajoko|worajoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:worajofthof|worajofthof]] || [[word:worajofjof|worajofjof]] || [[word:worajofshof|worajofshof]] || [[word:worajofkof|worajofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:worajÃŸfthÃŸf|worajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:worajÃŸfjÃŸf|worajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:worajÃŸfshÃŸf|worajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:worajÃŸfkÃŸf|worajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:worajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf|worajÃŸfthÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:worajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf|worajÃŸfjÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:worajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf|worajÃŸfshÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:worajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf|worajÃŸfkÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:worajÃŸfthÃŸf|worajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:worajÃŸfjÃŸf|worajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:worajÃŸfshÃŸf|worajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:worajÃŸfkÃŸf|worajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:worajÃŸfthÃŸf|worajÃŸfthÃŸf]] || [[word:worajÃŸfjÃŸf|worajÃŸfjÃŸf]] || [[word:worajÃŸfshÃŸf|worajÃŸfshÃŸf]] || [[word:worajÃŸfkÃŸf|worajÃŸfkÃŸf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:worajÃḊthÃḊ|worajÃḊthÃḊ]] || [[word:worajÃḊjÃḊ|worajÃḊjÃḊ]] || [[word:worajÃḊshÃḊ|worajÃḊshÃḊ]] || [[word:worajÃḊkÃḊ|worajÃḊkÃḊ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:worajathatha|worajathatha]] || [[word:worajajaja|worajajaja]] || [[word:worajashasha|worajashasha]] || [[word:worajakaka|worajakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:worajatha|worajatha]] || [[word:worajaja|worajaja]] || [[word:worajasha|worajasha]] || [[word:worajaka|worajaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:worajafthaf|worajafthaf]] || [[word:worajafjaf|worajafjaf]] || [[word:worajafshaf|worajafshaf]] || [[word:worajafkaf|worajafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:worajasha|worajasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:worajshÃḋsha|worajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:worajrosha|worajrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:worajmusha|worajmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:worajyasha|worajyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goworajnkshÃḋsha|goworajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goworajnkrosha|goworajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goworajnkmusha|goworajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goworajnkyasha|goworajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:worarajasha|worarajasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:worarajshÃḋsha|worarajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:worarajrosha|worarajrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:worarajmusha|worarajmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:worarajyasha|worarajyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goworarajnkshÃḋsha|goworarajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goworarajnkrosha|goworarajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goworarajnkmusha|goworarajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goworarajnkyasha|goworarajnkyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:werÃḊjasha|werÃḊjasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:werÃḊjshÃḋsha|werÃḊjshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:werÃḊjrosha|werÃḊjrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:werÃḊjmusha|werÃḊjmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:werÃḊjyasha|werÃḊjyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gowerÃḊjnkshÃḋsha|gowerÃḊjnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gowerÃḊjnkrosha|gowerÃḊjnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gowerÃḊjnkmusha|gowerÃḊjnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gowerÃḊjnkyasha|gowerÃḊjnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:worfajasha|worfajasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:worfajshÃḋsha|worfajshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:worfajrosha|worfajrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:worfajmusha|worfajmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:worfajyasha|worfajyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:goworfajnkshÃḋsha|goworfajnkshÃḋsha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:goworfajnkrosha|goworfajnkrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:goworfajnkmusha|goworfajnkmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:goworfajnkyasha|goworfajnkyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki adjectives]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d2c7592}}
